title: Compress
body:
Compress

This mod added more compressed block that you can craft from 9 of regular blocks to a one layer compressed block, and 9 of one layer compressed blocks can be craft to a two layer compressed block, this pattern keeps going until nine layer compressed block.
Blocks that can be compressed:
- Dirt - Stone - Cobblestone - Cobbled Deepslate - Granite - Diorite - Andesite - Sand - Gravel - Netherrack - Blackstone - End Stone
